privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task sets up a synthetically generated ENV_AUDITOR schema in Oracle representing building energy data. The expected CSV export path (/home/ga/Documents/top_50_penalties.csv) and result JSON path exactly match the task constraints and evaluation scripts. Additionally, the penalty rate ($268/ton) and the fuel emission coefficients for electricity, natural gas, and district steam all exactly match both the task description instructions and the explicit dynamic mock math verification performed by export_result.sh.
